heading: Getting it right in practice
description:
You told us clearly what the model needs to include. What we do not yet have is a clear picture of how each part works day to day, what roles and responsibilities look like across the national service lines and club-facing roles, and how services are delivered consistently across a movement of 74 clubs with very different sizes, contexts, and needs.

Before we come back to you in round 2, the project team needs to work through the operational detail behind each element of the hybrid model. That work is underway now.
